## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan the next strategic phase.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** Sitemap fixes unblocked indexing, driving a promising traffic spike. However, low on-page engagement signals a need to improve content stickiness.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** With \~50 pages published, the focus shifts from volume to quality and strategic breadth. Will will review GrowthX's content audit to guide this pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [**Reporting:** GrowthX will provide a formal readout for Metronome's leadership, starting with high-level bullets for tomorrow's marketing meeting (11 AM CT).](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [**Attribution:** To measure business impact, Metronome will provide GrowthX with HubSpot data (direct access or a spreadsheet export) for lead/pipeline attribution.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Traffic Spike:** Sitemap fixes unblocked indexing, driving a significant traffic spike in January/February.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [**Engagement Gap:** Despite the traffic, on-page engagement is low.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
      - [**Goal:** Improve content stickiness to drive users deeper into the site.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Low engagement risks high bounce rates and signals to search engines that content is not valuable.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**SEO Wins:**](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**Keyword Rankings:** Strong progress on non-branded keywords, with many on page 1 of Google.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [**AI Citations:** Content appears in AI-generated search responses (e.g., "Grok pricing"), a key win as these appear before organic results.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Reporting Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
      - [**Immediate:** Katya to provide high-level bullets for Will's marketing meeting (tomorrow, 11 AM CT).](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Recurring:** GrowthX will deliver a formal monthly readout on key metrics and business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)
      - [**Future:** Maddie (GrowthX) may join the next sync to present the readout.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

### Content Strategy & Attribution

  - [**Content Audit:** GrowthX delivered an audit of the first \~50 articles, identifying:](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Overrepresented categories → opportunities for deeper dives.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [Underrepresented categories → opportunities for expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** With \~50 pages published, the team will use the audit to guide the next content phase, focusing on quality and strategic breadth.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [**Example:** Expand coverage beyond AWS pricing to other hyperscalers.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tactic:** YouTube citations are a key driver for AI search responses.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
      - [**Action:** Integrate Metronome's YouTube content into articles to boost AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [**Attribution Tracking:** To measure business impact (leads, pipeline), GrowthX needs HubSpot data.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
      - [**Options:** Direct access or a spreadsheet export of aggregate data (first attribution URL, date).](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**JSON Template:** The updated template for pricing pages without public sources was implemented successfully for Week 6.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [**New Batch:** A new batch of 12 articles using the updated template has been sent for publication.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [Send high-level performance bullets to Will for tomorrow's marketing meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [Schedule the next sync for **March 4th at 2:30 PM CT**.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Will:**](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Review the content audit and discuss strategy with the Metronome team.](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Decide on the HubSpot data-sharing method (access vs. export).](https://fathom.video/share/t6reRNKH7YDZQFJZxALAbuese72gCdBs?tab=summary&timestamp=894.0)
